scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run sync:web && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:run: npm run sync:web && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:sync:live: set CAP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:5173&& npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run:live: set CAP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:5173&& npx cap run android
scripts.cap:open:live: set CAP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:5173&& npx cap open android
